Class DbConfig

java.lang.Object
DbConfig
public class DbConfig extends Object
Configuration object for database connection and table/column mappings. This class stores all database configuration parameters, including the database path, table name, and column names for each blood unit attribute. This allows the application to be flexible about the actual database structure while maintaining a consistent internal interface.

  • Constructor Details

    • DbConfig

      public DbConfig(String dbPath, String tableName, String unitIdCol, String bloodTypeCol, String donationDateCol, String expiryDateCol, String donorIdCol, String statusCol)
      Constructs a DbConfig with the specified database and table configuration. All parameters are required and define how the application connects to the database and maps blood unit attributes to database columns.
      Parameters:
      dbPath - the file path or connection string to the SQLite database
      tableName - the name of the table containing blood unit records
      unitIdCol - the column name for unit IDs
      bloodTypeCol - the column name for blood types
      donationDateCol - the column name for donation dates
      expiryDateCol - the column name for expiry dates
      donorIdCol - the column name for donor IDs
      statusCol - the column name for unit statuses

  • Method Details

      public String getDbPath()
      Gets the database file path or connection string.
      Returns:
      the database path

    • getJdbcUrl

      public String getJdbcUrl()
      Builds and returns the JDBC connection URL for the SQLite database.
      Returns:
      the JDBC URL in the format jdbc:sqlite:[dbPath]
